title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 demonstrates multimodal creative capabilities by generating both a fluid simulation synchronized to music beat and producing an EDM remix of Beethoven entirely through code generation, despite having no prior exposure to music.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 generating a fluid simulation synchronized to a musical beat and producing an EDM remix of Beethoven, both built entirely through code generation. It matters because the model handles these creative tasks despite having no prior exposure to music, pointing to multimodal capabilities that span simulation and audio. The takeaway: a single model can write code that drives beat-synced visuals and remixes a classical piece into EDM.
